headline: Goldman Sachs Mixed on Global Payments (GPN) As Industry Valuation Multiples Remain Under Pressure
summary: Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) secures a spot on our list of the 11 best very cheap stocks to buy according to billionaires. Goldman Sachs reinstated coverage of Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) on March 9, 2026, with a “Neutral” rating and an $88 price target, emphasizing the company’s size following its acquisition of Worldpay, which resulted in […]
